titleStmt.title: SII 41.137: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 137. (A.R. No. 136 of 1905.) Karuvūr, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi Taluk, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi District. On the Moṭṭai-gōpuram of the Pasupatīśvara temple at Karuvūr, right of entrance.

p.hi: Kongu Chōḻa (?) Year 3 = c. 13th century A.D.

summary.p: This is a communication from the king to Śivabrāhamaṇas, āṉdār, dēvaraḍiyār, Kaikkōḷa, Veḷḷāḷa, and uvachchar that they can enjoy the following privileges = to use double conches and the bērikai drum for both joyous and sorrowful occasions, to build two-storied houses, to use lime paste for the walls and put up double doors, to wear garlands of lotus flowers and not to pay the forty achchu they had been paying to the king. The officers who signed the document were Nandipanman, Vayirādarāyaṉ, Toṇḍaimāṉ, and Kāliṅgarāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ konermelkoṇṭāṉ veṅkāla nāṭṭuk
karuvūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvānilai Āḷuṭaiyār koyilkāṇiuṭaiya civappirā
maṇarkkum Āṇṭārkaḷukkun tevaraṭiyār kaikkoḷārkkum veḷḷārkku
m Uvaccarkkum Ōlai kuṭutta paricāvatu Ivarkaḷ naṉmai tiṉmaikaḷukku Iraṭṭai caṅku
Ūtavum perikai koṭṭavum taṅkaḷ viṭukaḷ Iraṇṭu nilai Eṭuttuc cāntu Iṭṭukkoḷ
ḷavum Iraṭṭai katavu Iṭṭukkoḷḷavum ceṅkaḻunirpūvāl vācikaitoḷmālai Iṭavum I
varkaḷ nam carakkukku taruvatāṉaaccu nāṟpatuṅ koṇṭu Ivarkaḷ makkaḷ ceytu
koḷvārkaḷ Āka nam Ōlai piṭipāṭāka kuṭuttom 3 varuṣam nāḷ 2 100 8 10 7 nattapaṉma
ṉ Eḻuttu Ivaiyirāttarāyaṉ Eḻuttu toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.137 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
